title: Mosquitoes and mosquito-borne diseases - Canada.ca
content:
## Mosquitoes and mosquito-borne diseases
Get more information on prevention of mosquitoes and mosquito-borne diseases.

## Mosquitoes and mosquito bites
Learn about mosquitoes, how to control them, and how to protect yourself from their bites.

### Insect bite and pest prevention
Learn how you can reduce your risk of infection and disease caused by bites, both at home and abroad.
